description_long: This house features a compact, single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade is defined by a modern, vertically-paneled door with a tall frosted glass insert, flanked by large rectangular windows on either side. The lower portion of the exterior walls is clad in red brick, while the upper sections are finished with light wood paneling and trim. The windows are set in symmetrical arrangements, and the front entryway is accentuated by a decorative transom window and wood framing. The roof overhangs slightly, providing some shelter to the entry, and the overall design is clean and contemporary with subtle traditional influences. The house appears to be designed for a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A compact, single-story house with a gray gable roof, brick and wood exterior, large front windows, and a modern glass-paneled door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door with a tall glass insert, flanked by large windows and topped with a decorative transom window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, brick base, and a pair of windows set in the wood-paneled wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary door and windows, with the same brick and wood exterior and gable roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with paired windows and visible roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Modern door with vertical glass insert, decorative transom window, wood trim, and slight roof overhang
